nodes.label: AI as creative catalyst for writing
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient for final writing
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not good enough to write news articles as well as professional journalists

nodes.label: AI as efficient information sifter
nodes.grounding_span: sift through large blocks of text for information that is relevant to news coverage

nodes.label: AI accuracy in summarization tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have found AI to be particularly accurate at these types of tasks

nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I generally collaborate with AI. I give it instructions and then I often refine those instructions later

nodes.label: AI as speed enabler in deadline-driven work
nodes.grounding_span: speed is particularly important in the newspaper business

nodes.label: Human-centered journalism as AI-resistant domain
nodes.grounding_span: I have been prioritizing the types of stories that AI is not good enough to generate — stories that have more human angles rather than data angles

nodes.label: Creative productivity and overcoming writer's block
nodes.grounding_span: AI allows me to break a creative block when writing stories

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in news production
nodes.grounding_span: speed is particularly important in the newspaper business

nodes.label: Journalistic integrity and human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: news organizations will not want to put their entire reputation in the hands of an AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative block breaker
nodes.grounding_span: I generally feel particularly satisfied when AI allows me to break a creative block

nodes.label: Trust in AI accuracy for summarization
nodes.grounding_span: I have found AI to be particularly accurate at these types of tasks

nodes.label: Pragmatic openness to expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I expect AI to continue playing an increasing role in my work

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing human journalists
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think they will replace humans

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — starts broad then narrows
nodes.grounding_span: I generally start with more open ended prompts and then make them more specific as needed

nodes.label: Strategic domain prioritization — focuses on human angles
nodes.grounding_span: I have been prioritizing the types of stories that AI is not good enough to generate — stories that have more human angles
